# FrasbergAI Copilot Contribution Policy

Copilot is not permitted to author commits in this repository.

Rules:
- Copilot must not generate commits.
- Copilot must not appear as a commit author.
- Copilot must not open pull requests.
- Copilot must not modify workflow files.
- Copilot must not apply code changes directly.

If Copilot generates code suggestions, they must be manually committed by a human author.

Any commit authored by Copilot will be rejected by the Policy-as-Code workflow.
